name: Long Life Noodles with Egg
recipeInstructions:
This dish is a traditional birthday snack in China.
Preparation: Wash and trim the spinach. Bring salted water to boil, then wash and boil the noodles until tender. Drain and divide among soup bowls. Blanch the spinach in the boiling water, drain, press dry, chop coarsely, and add to the noodles.
Heat the chicken broth in a saucepan. Add dark soy sauce, sesame oil, salt, and cornstarch paste to thicken slightly.
Poaching Eggs: Bring 4 cups of water to boil in a wok. Break eggs one at a time into the boiling water and poach for 2 minutes. Place the cooked egg on top of the spinach.
Finishing: Pour the hot soup over the egg, garnish with minced onions and ham, and serve.
